rawMessage: Merchant listing: Invalid value in field 'brand'. The 'brand' field must use @type 'Brand'. Got: 'Organization'.
recommendedFix: Change brand object @type from 'Organization' to 'Brand' in buildProductSchema(). Brand type does not support a url field — remove it. The bonus-codes/[slug].astro page already uses the correct Brand type.
validationSteps: Check dist/exchanges/bybit/index.html — grep for '"@type":"Brand"' in JSON-LD
Verify no '"@type":"Organization"' appears inside brand field
Paste /exchanges/bybit/ URL into Google Rich Results Test — no brand type errors
fixDescription: Changed brand @type from 'Organization' to 'Brand' in buildProductSchema() in src/utils/seo.ts. Removed the url field from the brand object (Brand schema does not use url). The bonus-codes page was already correct.
notes: Schema.org Product.brand accepts Brand or Organization types per spec, but Google's validator is strict and requires Brand for product brand attribution.
